item.title: Money making tips
item.description: ….From the Mitchell & Webb show. Edit: I love it when some of you sit there after watching such a comedy sketch, and comment as though you have just watched a factual documentary. Then proceed to argue your case on why this “documentary”is inaccurate. You guys are the best.
item.dc:creator: mercbrit

item.title: I’m a crafty bitch
item.description:
Made me some new shoes for dragoncon this year! This was my first time doing something like this so there was a lot of trial and error in my process. They aren’t perfect but I’m super happy with them!
Found some $4 boots at Aldi. Plan was hatched. Also hot tip for small-footed people. A woman’s 6 is a children’s 4. Children’s shoes are easily found up to size 5.
My first step was to try to make a pattern using the a common cosplay method. This failed and the duct tape kept moving around. It wasn’t until later I learned I probably could have made a pattern with the painters tape that would have led to fewer scraps than the process I ended up using made.
Look at my failure.
Taped them up and then painted them for a more neutral base
Fabric cutting time! I’m not using most of this
I cut around a foot of a six foot long fabric
More paint
Attached my fabric with rubber cement. Started with the tongue of the shoe
It lives!
Finished with a fabric mod podge
Sealed with this mod podge to make it outdoor safe
Painted some fuck up spots with some blue acrylic paint
And the finished look!
Beautiful
Taxes
item.dc:creator: dontmakemechooseaname

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
good times
i'm on team sugar
always trying to catch me ridin dirty
accurate
some of the best clicks
that's odd
mmm hmm
as is tradition
nothing like a jersey olive garden
never knew i needed a gorilla sofa until now
finally
uncanny
true facts
those crazy brits
yes everything?
indeed it is
that's my time... have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I’m pulling for your mental health
item.description: Declutter to improve mood
item.dc:creator: SenseiTheDefender

item.title: There are no words for how bad I feel.
item.description:
I thank God for my friends who not only et me bury her on their property but helped me dig her grave. She just stopped eating enough. Stopped bathing herself. The vet sometimes a cat will do that in old age. She would have been 15 in October. I did everything I possibly could to get her to eat more. My mom passed last month and we just had her memorial service Saturday. I'm better now that Snooks is buried.
EDIT: I thank everyone for the well wishes. I didn't know it would hurt this much. I've been crying off and on all day. I don't cry easily. I'm staying with wonderful friends for the day and night. Getting drunk off my fucking ass when I go home.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: There are people whom I admire but do not want to meet, because I'd be embarrassed at my inability to hold up my end of a serious conversation with them. Dr. May is one of them.

item.title: So soft so tender so fragile
item.description: I'm afraid if I touch it I might hurt it
item.dc:creator: Raneem90

item.title: The only drawback to getting drunk on 13.5% ABV red wine is you can't chug it to hurry it up.
item.description: I hung out with friends all day. I have awesome friends. I drove to their places and gave them aall of Snooks's stuff, her toys, towers, and food. Came back home and the vet called and I absolutely fucking lost it. I have never cried that hard or that loudly in my entire life, not even as a kid. They didn't charge for the euthanasia. Great people. Now I'm home alone. Getting drunk as fast as I can. I can't thank all you enough. Imgur is the greatest community of good people on the Net. This is gonna take fucking days to get over.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Sorry, I don't know how to tag people. Thanks #thefreepizzadude!
item.description: Decided to bypass the the middleman and just surprise my friend with a couple large pizzas and some cheesy bread. I know he's too proud to ask for anything but I also know he really needs this and it will make him happy and feel loved. He's a great guy and totally deserves it.

item.title: Images of note: HEAVEN IS OUR DESTINATION!
item.description:
Imagine thinking Western Civilisation is so weak it can be destroyed by (checks notes) furries.
ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding ding
Gary!
btw this is me most of the time
we need that now more than ever
I'm kinda amazed they're doing this.
ZOOOM
Get more out of life, see a fucked up movie
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: I hate how everyone gaslit me and turns out I was right
item.description: Source: https://open.substack.com/pub/erininthemorn/p/transgender-adults-being-cut-from?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=2dhxde I'm so exhausted. Having my basic human rights taken away. It's not an if anymore, it's a when. I'm gonna have to watch my spouse get arrested for being trans and black. I'm gonna have to be thrown in a concentration camp myself because I'm trans. No money to escape the USA, and even if I did, there isn't a single fully safe country in the world that we could escape to. What's the fucking point anymore? Why the hell am I still alive in the first place? If I disappear, you know why. Please make the world better for future generations.
item.dc:creator: chaosbuni

item.dc:creator: BibiBlocksberg

item.title: Asshole Abbott removed 1 Million voters from the registry. Were you one?
item.description: I checked my status at vote.org, and I'm still good. It took maybe 30 seconds. If you live in Texas, and in particular one of the bigger counties (Bexar, Harris, Hidalgo, everybody in the Dallas Metro - I'm lookin' at y'all) - you NEED to check. You have to register on a physical form, and time is running out to do that if you plan to vote in November, so quit procrastinating and click the link. vote.org Tell all your friends, too.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: Music dump, I need to go to bed edition
item.description:
Keep it simple! Night folks. The Muses will sing of us tomorrow
Shits been rough but I always love a good music dump, send me your gifs
Fus Ro Dah
Goddamn them all, I was told we'd cruise the seas for American gold, we'd fire no guns, shed no tears
You're not the God of Hammers
Sauce, MaryN
Anyway here's unrelated Belgian techno anthem Pump Up The Jam
item.dc:creator: GravyEducation

item.title: 4H Grand Champion
item.description: My siblings are 15+ years younger so our relationship has always been different. My sister called me, on her own, for the first time ever to tell me she won. And she is going for Master Showman! ???
